idea-plugin.name: Domorium GEDCOM
idea-plugin.description:
Domorium helps you read and edit .ged and .gedcom files with confidence. It understands the GEDCOM structure, suggests valid entries, and reports problems as you type.

Features

  • Context-aware GEDCOM autocomplete
  • Real-time structural validation
  • Semantic syntax highlighting
  • Hover information for GEDCOM tags
  • Go to definition for cross-references
  • Find all XREF references with read/write highlights
  • Safe, atomic XREF rename
  • Clickable web and local-file links
  • Quick fixes for broken references and invalid levels
  • Code folding for records and nested structures
  • Support for .ged and .gedcom files

Requirements

Requires Node.js on PATH. The GEDCOM language server is bundled with the plugin and runs locally.

Try Domorium in your browser · Source code and issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • Added Find All References and read/write XREF highlights
  • Added safe, atomic XREF rename with stale-edit protection
  • Added clickable web and local-file links
  • Added quick fixes for broken references and invalid GEDCOM levels

0.1.1

  • Moved the product screenshot from the description to the Marketplace media gallery

0.1.0

  • Initial JetBrains Marketplace release
  • Context-aware GEDCOM autocomplete
  • Real-time validation and semantic highlighting
  • Hover information and go to definition for cross-references
  • Document navigation and code folding

server.name: Domorium GEDCOM Language Server
server.description: The domorium GEDCOM language server (packages/lsp), run as a standalone Node.js process over stdio.
